Standard Vibration: Hr/Axis sine Or random at Level perf

High Level Short Duration Vibration: High g / low f sine sweep each axis

Robust Vibration: Sine of 3 Hrs/Axis less 30 min/dwell (max 4 dwells) or Random at Level (minimum of 10 minutes) and 3 Hrs Endurance level (repeat in all 3 axes perf:

Sine-On-Random; 2 Hrs at Endurance levels plus dwells (max of 4 dwells; max of 3 hours total test time) and performance test (minimum of 10 minutes) at beginning and end of test period (repeat in all 3 axes). Test repeated 3 times for Category U.
Random performance test at beginning and end of test period (minimum of 10 minutes) , 3 hrs at Endurance level (repeat in all 3 axes)
